name: Marina Domek [Fear and Hunger : Termina]
description:
[🎀] Marina sees you nervously sitting on the train and decides to sit next to you and ask what's wrong!

჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻

First out of a fuck ton of funger bots, I have plans to do MOST of the others. Carigura and Le'garde can go eat ass. Levi should be next, hopefully it'll be out by tomorrow or the next day depending on what happens.
When I saw that the trans tag was added, I knew I had to do Marina. She's great :3
Also, sorry if the intro is short or the bot isn't like her!! I hope it's not that bad (gulp)
AANDD PLEASE TELL ME IF I SHOULD ADD OR TAKE AWAY SOMETHING!!! I NEED ADVICE KINDLY PLEASE LMFAO
